recommendations.title: Increase daily water intake
recommendations.detail: Currently self-rated as average. Target 2–2.5L/day. Keep a 1L bottle visible and finish it twice before dinner.

recommendations.title: Add a protein shake on weekends
recommendations.detail: Weekend protein drops to ~83g (vs ~148g on weekdays) because there's no morning shake. Adding one brings weekly average up to target.

recommendations.title: Improve VO2 Max
recommendations.detail: Currently 32.9 mL/kg/min — below average for age 39. This is the strongest single predictor of longevity. Zone 2 cardio and intervals are the main levers.

recommendations.title: Switch to dark chocolate (70%+)
recommendations.detail: Current ~200 kcal/day of chocolate is the main discretionary calories. Dark chocolate 70%+ has lower sugar and meaningful cardiovascular and cognitive evidence.

experiments.title: Fat Loss to 82 kg
experiments.detail: ~500 kcal/day deficit targeting 0.45 kg/week. Weigh every Sunday morning. Maintain training volume.

planned.title: Weekend Protein Fix
planned.detail: Add whey shake on Sat/Sun mornings to close the weekend protein gap.

planned.title: Hydration Habit
planned.detail: 2–2.5L water daily. 1L bottle visible, finish twice before dinner.

planned.title: VO2 Max Protocol
planned.detail: Structured Zone 2 cardio + intervals to move VO2 Max from 32.9 toward above-average for age.
